raw_consumer_statement:
I requested written confirmation from American Express that a {$2.00} AutoPay return recorded on XX/XX/year>, was the result of an internal error, specifically, a system-generated attempt to collect payment for a fraudulent charge that had already been flagged and should have been removed by Amex. I also requested the removal of the XX/XX/XXXX return entry from my account record or a written acknowledgment that it was not caused by any customer failure to pay. 

Amex has admitted over the phone that the charge was a fraud-related oversight and credited the amount back to my account. However, they refused to provide written documentation or clarification of the error, and they stated they can not remove the XX/XX/XXXX return record, even though it has harmed my spending power and damaged my financial relationship with Amex.
